cross_review_notes: Alpaca execution block spans health + performance: the 'keys set incorrectly' health alert and the 'no_fill_all_accounts' performance rejections are the SAME root cause — alpaca_live balance ~$150. Fixing one fixes both.

bot restart + watchdog auto-recovery within window: no new trades fired immediately post-restart, consistent with restart happening outside market hours or during a quiet tick. Not correlated with a specific strategy failure.

Paper book +$801 reconciler artifacts mask genuine strategy signal quality — ada, xrp, eth paper longs closed at 'open' timestamp (openedAt == closedAt ms apart), confirming these are reconciler phantom entries not real paper positions.
